zh.lifeSummary: 當Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester於大約1154年出生在法國諾門迪艾波奧蒙吉萊-洛格時，她的父親Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester34歲，母親Petronella de Grandmesnil21歲。她於1165年與Simon IV de Montfort結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1215年9月3日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫-馬利洛福特享年62歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯沙吉雷米-利諾雷。

法国努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫-馬利洛福特

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester于大约1154年出生在法国諾門迪艾波奧蒙吉萊-洛格时，她的父亲Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester34岁，母亲Petronella de Grandmesnil21岁。她于1165年与Simon IV de Montfort结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1215年9月3日在法国努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫-馬利洛福特享年62岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯沙吉雷米-利諾雷。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Amice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a medieval given name derived from Latin ami(ci)tia ‘friendship’ see Amity .

en.lifeSummary: When Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester was born about 1154, in Beaumont-le-Roger, Eure, Normandy, France, her father, Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester, was 34 and her mother, Petronella de Grandmesnil, was 21. She married Simon IV de Montfort in 1165. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 3 September 1215, in Rochefort, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 62, and was buried in Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester est née environ 1154, à Beaumont-le-Roger, Eure, Normandie, France, son père, Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Petronella de Grandmesnil, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Simon IV de Montfort en 1165. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 3 septembre 1215, à Rochefort, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester um 1154 in Beaumont-le-Roger, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester 34 und ihre Mutter Petronella de Grandmesnil 21. Sie hat 1165 Simon IV de Montfort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 3. September 1215 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Rochefort, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester è nata il circa 1154 nel Beaumont-le-Roger, Eure, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Petronella de Grandmesnil, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Simon IV de Montfort nel 1165. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 3 settembre 1215, nel Rochefort, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Amice De Beaumont Of Leicesterが約1154年にフランスノーマンディエウアビーウモント-レ-ロジャーで生まれた時，父Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicesterは34歳，母Petronella de Grandmesnilは21歳であった。1165年にSimon IV de Montfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1215年9月3日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインチャーエンテ-マリティメロチェフォートで62歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスサイント-ルeムイ-ル'hオノーeにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester(이)가 대략 1154년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 보몽-레-로거에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Petronella de Grandmesnil(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1165년 Simon IV de Montfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1215년 9월 3일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 처테-마이팀 록헤포트에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 세인트-e미-'호노e에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester nasceu aproximadamente 1154, em Beaumont-le-Roger, Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Petronella de Grandmesnil, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Simon IV de Montfort em 1165. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1215, em Rochefort, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester родилась около 1154 г. в местности бомонт-ле-рогир, эур, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Petronella de Grandmesnil, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon IV de Montfort в 1165 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 3 сентября 1215 г. в местности рошефорт, чаренте-маритим, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт-рeми-л'хонорe, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester nació aproximadamente 1154, en Beaumont-le-Roger, Eure, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Petronella de Grandmesnil, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Simon IV de Montfort en 1165. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1215, en Rochefort, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia.
